assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing

Lines 17-56 show all four config sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) marked as '(new)'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 48-51: Step 9 'Security Configuration' states 'User interaction (simulated): User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project. Action: Security Configuration section was not created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 39 after Bug Configuration). changes-log.md lines 54-56 confirm: '## Security Configuration — Not added — user declined to enable security triage.'
